languages.text: L'utilisateur gagne +30 Connaissance (Warp). Lorsqu'une cible affectée par l'effet {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspiration{/g} effectue un acte héroïque, il bénéficie d'un tour supplémentaire effectif immédiatement.

languages.text: 装备者的知识（亚空间）提高30点。每当受{g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}鼓舞人心{/g}效果影响的目标施展英雄壮举时，装备者立即获得一个额外回合。
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +30 Lore (Warp). Whenever a target affected by the {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}inspire{/g} effect performs a heroic act, the wearer gains an extra turn, effective immediately.

traits.locale_text: 装备者的知识（亚空间）提高30点。每当受{g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}鼓舞人心{/g}效果影响的目标施展英雄壮举时，装备者立即获得一个额外回合。

languages.text: El portador obtiene +30 de Conocimiento (disformidad). Cada vez que un objetivo afectado por el efecto {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}inspiración{/g} realice un acto heroico, el portador gana un turno extra con efecto inmediato.
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +30 Lore (Warp). Whenever a target affected by the {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}inspire{/g} effect performs a heroic act, the wearer gains an extra turn, effective immediately.

traits.locale_text: El portador obtiene +30 de Conocimiento (disformidad). Cada vez que un objetivo afectado por el efecto {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}inspiración{/g} realice un acto heroico, el portador gana un turno extra con efecto inmediato.

languages.text: Der Träger erhält +30 Wissen (Warp). Führt ein mit {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspirieren{/g} belegtes Ziel eine Heldentat aus, erhält der Träger sofort einen zusätzlichen Zug.
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +30 Lore (Warp). Whenever a target affected by the {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}inspire{/g} effect performs a heroic act, the wearer gains an extra turn, effective immediately.

languages.text: 装備者は+30{g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreWarp}ロア（ワープ）{/g}を得る。{g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}インスパイア{/g}の効果を受けている対象が英雄的な行為を行うと、装備者はすぐに追加ターンを得る。
languages.original_text: The wearer gains +30 {g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreWarp}Lore (Warp){/g}. Whenever a target affected by the effect of {g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}Inspire{/g} performs a heroic act, the wearer immediately gains an extra turn.

traits.locale_text: 装備者は+30{g|Encyclopedia:SkillLoreWarp}ロア（ワープ）{/g}を得る。{g|f:b34dd87c65af46c69c35502e3e1cfe93}インスパイア{/g}の効果を受けている対象が英雄的な行為を行うと、装備者はすぐに追加ターンを得る。
